<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Design and Development of a Mobility Platform for Medicine Delivery in Healthcare Facilities</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..40,300;0,9..40,400;0,9..40,500;0,9..40,600;1,9..40,300&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  :root {
    --teal: #0F6E56; --teal-light: #E1F5EE; --teal-mid: #1D9E75; --teal-soft: #9FE1CB;
    --blue: #185FA5; --blue-light: #E6F1FB;
    --gray-bg: #F7F8FA; --gray-line: #E4E7EC; --gray-text: #6B7280;
    --dark: #111827; --body: #374151; --white: #ffffff;
    --radius: 12px; --radius-sm: 8px;
    --shadow-sm: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.06), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
    --shadow-md: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
  }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; color: var(--body); background: var(--white); line-height: 1.7; font-size: 16px; overflow-x: hidden; }

  nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.93); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-line); z-index: 100; padding: 0 2rem; height: 60px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
  .nav-brand { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; color: var(--teal); letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 1.6rem; }
  .nav-links a { font-size: 13px; color: var(--gray-text); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--teal); }

  section { padding: 5rem 2rem; max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }

  /* HERO */
  #hero { min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; text-align: center; padding-top: 80px; max-width: 100%; background: radial-gradient(ellipse 800px 500px at 50% 0%, rgba(29,158,117,0.07) 0%, transparent 70%), var(--white); }
  .hero-inner { max-width: 880px; padding: 0 2rem; }
  .hero-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: var(--teal-light); color: var(--teal); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 100px; margin-bottom: 2rem; border: 1px solid rgba(15,110,86,0.2); }
  .hero-tag::before { content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; background: var(--teal-mid); border-radius: 50%; }

  h1.project-title { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 3.2vw, 2.7rem); font-weight: 600; color: var(--dark); line-height: 1.22; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  h1.project-title .accent { color: var(--teal); }
  h1.project-title .subtitle-line { display: block; font-size: 0.63em; color: var(--gray-text); font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0; margin-top: 0.35rem; }
  .hero-sub { font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--gray-text); font-weight: 300; margin-bottom: 3.5rem; }

  .team-grid { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; }
  .member-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 1.5rem 1.25rem; background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--gray-line); border-radius: var(--radius); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); width: 162px; transition: box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.2s; }
  .member-card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .avatar { width: 72px; height: 72px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--teal-light); border: 2px dashed var(--teal-soft); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; }
  .avatar img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; display: none; }
  .avatar-ph { font-size: 10px; color: var(--teal); opacity: 0.7; text-align: center; line-height: 1.4; }
  .member-name { font-weight: 500; font-size: 13px; color: var(--dark); text-align: center; line-height: 1.3; }
  .member-id { font-size: 11px; color: var(--gray-text); }
  .member-role { font-size: 11px; color: var(--teal); font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.03em; }

  .sup-card { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--teal-light), rgba(225,245,238,0.25)); border: 1px solid rgba(15,110,86,0.2); border-radius: var(--radius); margin: 0 auto; max-width: 340px; }
  .sup-av { width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--white); border: 2px dashed var(--teal-soft); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; overflow: hidden; }
  .sup-av img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; display: none; }

  .section-divider { width: 100%; height: 1px; background: var(--gray-line); max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .s-label { font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--teal); font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .s-heading { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 2.8vw, 2.1rem); font-weight: 600; color: var(--dark); letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.25; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .s-body { font-size: 15px; color: var(--body); line-height: 1.8; max-width: 720px; }

  .abstract-card { background: var(--gray-bg); border: 1px solid var(--gray-line); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 2rem 2.5rem; margin-top: 2rem; position: relative; }
  .abstract-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 4px; background: var(--teal-mid); border-radius: 4px 0 0 4px; }

  /* OBJECTIVES */
  .obj-card { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 1.25rem; padding: 1.5rem 1.75rem; background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--gray-line); border-radius: var(--radius); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); transition: box-shadow 0.2s; }
  .obj-card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); }
  .obj-num { flex-shrink: 0; width: 38px; height: 38px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; }

  /* PILLARS */
  .pillars-container { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; margin-top: 2.5rem; }
  .pillars-row { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .pillar-card { flex: 1; min-width: 220px; max-width: 300px; border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 1.75rem 1.5rem; text-align: center; border: 1px solid var(--gray-line); background: var(--white); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease, box-shadow 0.2s; }
  .pillar-card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); }
  .pillar-card.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  .pillar-card:nth-child(1) { transition-delay: 0s; }
  .pillar-card:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 0.15s; }
  .pillar-card:nth-child(3) { transition-delay: 0.3s; }
  .p-icon { width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 0 auto 1rem; }
  .p-icon.teal { background: var(--teal-light); color: var(--teal); }
  .p-icon.blue { background: var(--blue-light); color: var(--blue); }
  .p-icon.amber { background: #FFF4E0; color: #9A5E00; }
  .p-title { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--dark); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .p-body { font-size: 13px; color: var(--gray-text); line-height: 1.6; }

  .merge-arrow { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; padding: 0.4rem 0; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.5s ease 0.7s; }
  .merge-arrow.visible { opacity: 1; }
  .arrow-branch { display: flex; gap: 6rem; }
  .branch-line { width: 2px; height: 26px; background: var(--gray-line); }
  .converge-line { width: 2px; height: 24px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--gray-line), var(--teal-mid)); }

  /* ROBOT PHOTO */
  .robot-showcase { max-width: 620px; width: 100%; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px) scale(0.97); transition: opacity 0.6s ease 1s, transform 0.6s ease 1s; }
  .robot-showcase.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
  .robot-frame { background: var(--gray-bg); border: 2.5px dashed var(--teal-soft); border-radius: var(--radius) var(--radius) 0 0; overflow: hidden; position: relative; aspect-ratio: 4/3; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s; }
  .robot-frame:hover { border-color: var(--teal-mid); background: #f0faf6; }
  .robot-frame img { display: none; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: var(--white); }
  .robot-frame input[type="file"] { display: none; }
  .upload-hint { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; pointer-events: none; }
  .upload-icon-wrap { width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--white); border: 1.5px solid var(--teal-soft); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--teal); }
  .upload-text { font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; color: var(--dark); }
  .upload-sub { font-size: 12px; color: var(--gray-text); }
  .robot-caption { background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--gray-line); border-top: 3px solid var(--teal-mid); border-radius: 0 0 var(--radius) var(--radius); padding: 1.1rem 1.5rem; text-align: center; }
  .robot-caption-title { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; color: var(--dark); }
  .robot-caption-sub { font-size: 12px; color: var(--gray-text); margin-top: 3px; }

  /* SPECS TABLE */
  .cost-banner { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; background: var(--teal-light); border: 1px solid rgba(15,110,86,0.25); border-radius: 100px; padding: 7px 18px; font-size: 14px; color: var(--teal); font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
  .cost-banner::before { content: ''; width: 7px; height: 7px; background: var(--teal-mid); border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .specs-wrap { overflow-x: auto; border-radius: var(--radius); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); margin-top: 0.5rem; }
  table.specs { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 14px; }
  table.specs thead tr { background: var(--teal); }
  table.specs thead th { padding: 13px 16px; text-align: left; font-weight: 500; color: #fff; white-space: nowrap; }
  table.specs thead th:first-child { border-radius: 8px 0 0 0; }
  table.specs thead th:last-child  { border-radius: 0 8px 0 0; }
  table.specs tbody tr:nth-child(odd)  { background: var(--white); }
  table.specs tbody tr:nth-child(even) { background: var(--gray-bg); }
  table.specs tbody td { padding: 11px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-line); vertical-align: middle; }
  table.specs tbody td:first-child { color: var(--gray-text); }
  table.specs tbody td:nth-child(2) { font-weight: 500; color: var(--dark); white-space: nowrap; }
  table.specs tbody td:nth-child(3) { color: var(--gray-text); font-size: 13px; }
  table.specs tbody tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }

  /* HOW IT WORKS */
  #how-it-works { border-radius:var(--radius); }
  .flow-step { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 56px 1fr; gap: 0 1.5rem; opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-20px); transition: opacity 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease; }
  .flow-step.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
  .step-left { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; }
  .step-num { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--white); border: 2px solid var(--teal-soft); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; color: var(--teal); flex-shrink: 0; }
  .step-connector { flex: 1; width: 2px; background: var(--gray-line); margin: 4px 0; min-height: 24px; }
  .flow-step:last-child .step-connector { display: none; }
  .step-right { padding-bottom: 2rem; }
  .step-heading { font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; color: var(--dark); margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-top: 8px; }
  .step-desc { font-size: 14px; color: var(--gray-text); line-height: 1.6; }
  .step-video { margin-top: 1rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); border: 2px dashed var(--gray-line); background: var(--white); padding: 1.25rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s; }
  .step-video:hover { border-color: var(--teal-soft); background: var(--teal-light); }
  .play-btn { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--teal-light); border: 1px solid var(--teal-soft); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .play-icon { width: 0; height: 0; border-top: 7px solid transparent; border-bottom: 7px solid transparent; border-left: 12px solid var(--teal); margin-left: 2px; }
  .video-label { font-size: 13px; color: var(--gray-text); }
  .video-label strong { display: block; font-size: 13px; color: var(--body); font-weight: 500; }

  .tech-grid { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.75rem; margin-top: 1.5rem; }

  /* PILLAR IMAGE */
  .pillar-img-wrap { width:100%; height:140px; border-radius:8px; border:2px dashed var(--teal-soft); background:var(--gray-bg); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; cursor:pointer; position:relative; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:1rem; transition:border-color 0.2s,background 0.2s; }
  .pillar-img-wrap:hover { border-color:var(--teal-mid); background:var(--teal-light); }
  .pillar-img-hint { display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:4px; pointer-events:none; }
  .pillar-img-hint span { font-size:11px; color:var(--gray-text); font-weight:500; }

  /* STEP IMAGE */
  .step-img-box { margin-top:0.75rem; width:100%; height:200px; border-radius:var(--radius-sm); border:2px dashed var(--gray-line); background:var(--white); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; cursor:pointer; position:relative; overflow:hidden; transition:border-color 0.2s,background 0.2s; }
  .step-img-box:hover { border-color:var(--teal-soft); background:var(--teal-light); }
  .step-img-hint { display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:6px; pointer-events:none; }
  .step-img-hint span { font-size:13px; color:var(--gray-text); font-weight:500; }

  /* INFOGRAPHIC */
  .infograph-grid { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:flex-start; gap:0; margin-top:0; }
  .infograph-step { flex:1; min-width:150px; max-width:200px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; text-align:center; padding:1.25rem 0.75rem; position:relative; }
  .infograph-num { width:28px; height:28px; border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:13px; margin-bottom:0.85rem; flex-shrink:0; }
  .infograph-icon { width:64px; height:64px; border-radius:16px; border:1.5px solid; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; margin-bottom:0.75rem; }
  .infograph-label { font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif; font-weight:600; font-size:13px; color:var(--dark); margin-bottom:0.4rem; line-height:1.3; }
  .infograph-desc { font-size:12px; color:var(--gray-text); line-height:1.55; }
  .infograph-arrow { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:1.4rem; color:var(--teal-soft); padding-top:1.5rem; flex-shrink:0; align-self:flex-start; margin-top:3.5rem; }
  .infograph-arrow-wrap { display:none; }
  .stack-pill { background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius:100px; padding:4px 12px; font-size:12px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85); font-weight:400; white-space:nowrap; }
  @media (max-width:900px) { .infograph-grid { justify-content:center; } .infograph-step { min-width:140px; } .infograph-arrow-wrap { display:flex; } }
  @media (max-width:640px) { .infograph-arrow { display:none; } .infograph-step { min-width:120px; max-width:160px; } }
  .tech-pill { padding: 6px 14px; background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--gray-line); border-radius: 100px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--body); transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; }
  .tech-pill:hover { background: var(--teal-light); border-color: var(--teal-soft); color: var(--teal); }
  .tech-pill.primary { background: var(--teal-light); border-color: var(--teal-soft); color: var(--teal); font-weight: 500; }

  footer { border-top: 1px solid var(--gray-line); padding: 2.5rem 2rem; text-align: center; font-size: 13px; color: var(--gray-text); }
  footer strong { color: var(--teal); }

  .fade-in { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease; }
  .fade-in.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

  @media (max-width: 640px) {
    nav .nav-links { display: none; }
    .team-grid { gap: 1rem; }
    .member-card { width: 140px; }
    .pillars-row { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; }
    #how-it-works { border-radius: 0; }
    .abstract-card { padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem; }
    table.specs thead th:nth-child(3), table.specs tbody td:nth-child(3) { display: none; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <div class="nav-brand">P2222 &mdash; FYP</div>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#overview">Overview</a>
    <a href="#objectives">Objectives</a>
    <a href="#pillars">System</a>
    <a href="#specs">Specs</a>
    <a href="#how-it-works">How It Works</a>
    <a href="#demo-video">Demo Video</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<div id="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">

    <!-- AIR UNIVERSITY LOGO -->
    <div style="margin-bottom:1.75rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.6rem;">
      <div id="auLogoWrap"
        style="width:110px;height:110px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--teal-soft);background:var(--white);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;position:relative;">
        <img id="auLogoImg" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Air University Logo"
          style="width:95%;height:95%;object-fit:contain;">
        <input type="file" id="auLogoFile" accept="image/*" style="display:none;">
        <div id="auLogoHint" style="display:none;"></div>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:center;">
        <div style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:13px;color:var(--dark);letter-spacing:0.01em;">Air University</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--gray-text);">Islamabad, Pakistan</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-tag">Final Year Project &nbsp;·&nbsp; Mechatronics Engineering</div>
    <h1 class="project-title">
      Design and Development of a<br>
      <span class="accent">Mobility Platform for Medicine Delivery</span>
      <span class="subtitle-line">in Healthcare Facilities</span>
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Air University, Islamabad &nbsp;·&nbsp; Department of Mechatronics Engineering &nbsp;·&nbsp; Session 2022–2026</p>

    <div class="team-grid">
      <div class="member-card">
        <div class="avatar" style="border:2px solid var(--teal-soft);background:var(--white);"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Sana Raouf" style="display:block;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:50%;"></div>
        <div class="member-name">Sana Raouf</div>
        <div class="member-id">221701</div>
        <div class="member-role">Group Member</div>
      </div>
      <div class="member-card">
        <div class="avatar" style="border:2px solid var(--teal-soft);background:var(--white);"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Arslan Rizwan" style="display:block;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:50%;"></div>
        <div class="member-name">Arslan Rizwan</div>
        <div class="member-id">221739</div>
        <div class="member-role">Group Member</div>
      </div>
      <div class="member-card">
        <div class="avatar" style="border:2px solid var(--teal-soft);background:var(--white);"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Aakasha Amjad" style="display:block;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:50%;"></div>
        <div class="member-name">Aakasha Amjad</div>
        <div class="member-id">222614</div>
        <div class="member-role">Group Member</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="sup-card">
      <div class="sup-av" style="border:2px solid var(--teal-soft);background:var(--white);">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Dr. Umair Aziz" style="display:block;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:50%;">
      </div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;color:var(--teal);font-weight:500;">Project Supervisor</div>
        <div style="font-weight:600;font-size:15px;color:var(--dark);">Dr. Umair Aziz</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--gray-text);line-height:1.4;">Dept. of Mechatronics Engineering<br>Air University, Islamabad</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="section-divider"></div>

<!-- OVERVIEW -->
<section id="overview">
  <div class="fade-in">
    <div class="s-label">Project Overview</div>
    <h2 class="s-heading">Autonomous Medicine Delivery<br>for Healthcare Facilities</h2>
    <p class="s-body">Traditional hospital logistics rely heavily on staff, leading to inefficiencies and contamination risks. This project delivers a smarter, autonomous alternative.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="abstract-card fade-in" style="transition-delay:0.1s;">
    <p style="font-size:15px;line-height:1.85;color:var(--body);">
      This project focuses on the design and development of an <strong>autonomous ground robot</strong> for medicine delivery in healthcare facilities. The robot uses a <strong>LiDAR sensor</strong> combined with advanced algorithms — <strong>SLAM, MPPI, AMCL, and NAV2</strong> — to support real-time localization, mapping, and path planning in hospital environments.
    </p>
    <p style="font-size:15px;line-height:1.85;color:var(--body);margin-top:1rem;">
      The workflow begins with SLAM for environment mapping. Once mapped, the robot autonomously navigates using NAV2 (controlled by MPPI), leveraging AMCL to compare the saved map against live LiDAR data for accurate localization. Medicine delivery is initiated via <strong>RFID card authentication</strong>, and the robot proceeds to the selected ward while avoiding obstacles in real time.
    </p>
    <p style="font-size:15px;line-height:1.85;color:var(--body);margin-top:1rem;">
      This solution aligns with <strong>SDG 3</strong> (Good Health &amp; Well-Being) and <strong>SDG 9</strong> (Industry, Innovation &amp; Infrastructure), offering a scalable, intelligent approach to reducing healthcare personnel workload and contamination risks.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="section-divider"></div>

<!-- OBJECTIVES -->
<section id="objectives">
  <div class="fade-in">
    <div class="s-label">Project Objectives</div>
    <h2 class="s-heading">What We Set Out to Achieve</h2>
  </div>
  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;margin-top:2rem;">

    <div class="obj-card fade-in" style="transition-delay:0.05s;">
      <div class="obj-num" style="background:var(--teal-light);border:1.5px solid var(--teal-soft);color:var(--teal);">1</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-weight:600;font-size:15px;color:var(--dark);margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Design and Develop a Mobility Platform for Medicine Delivery in Hospital Environments</div>
        <div style="font-size:14px;color:var(--gray-text);line-height:1.6;">Design and develop a fully functional autonomous mobility platform purpose-built for medicine delivery in hospital environments — from mechanical chassis design and material selection to electronics integration and software deployment.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="obj-card fade-in" style="transition-delay:0.12s;">
      <div class="obj-num" style="background:var(--blue-light);border:1.5px solid #B5D4F4;color:var(--blue);">2</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-weight:600;font-size:15px;color:var(--dark);margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Integrate LiDAR for Real-Time Mapping, Localization, and Obstacle Avoidance</div>
        <div style="font-size:14px;color:var(--gray-text);line-height:1.6;">Integrate a LiDAR sensor to enable real-time environment mapping using SLAM, accurate robot localization via AMCL, and dynamic obstacle detection and avoidance during autonomous navigation throughout the hospital.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="obj-card fade-in" style="transition-delay:0.2s;">
      <div class="obj-num" style="background:#FFF4E0;border:1.5px solid #FAC775;color:#9A5E00;">3</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-weight:600;font-size:15px;color:var(--dark);margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Implement a Path Planning Algorithm for Indoor Navigation in Hospitals</div>
        <div style="font-size:14px;color:var(--gray-text);line-height:1.6;">Implement a robust path planning algorithm (NAV2 + MPPI) that enables the robot to autonomously plan and execute efficient, collision-free routes through complex indoor hospital layouts and corridors.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<div class="section-divider"></div>

<!-- PILLARS -->

    <p class="s-body">Three integrated subsystems come together to form a complete autonomous delivery platform.</p>

  <div class="pillars-container">

      <!-- PILLAR 1 -->

<!-- SPECS -->
<section id="specs">
  <div class="fade-in">
    <div class="s-label">Technical Specifications</div>
    <h2 class="s-heading">Robot at a Glance</h2>
    <p class="s-body" style="margin-bottom:1.25rem;">Key hardware and performance parameters of the developed platform.</p>
    <div class="cost-banner">Total Project Cost &nbsp;&nbsp;<strong style="font-size:15px;">$529.73</strong></div>
  </div>

  <div class="specs-wrap fade-in" style="transition-delay:0.1s;">
    <table class="specs">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Parameter</th>
          <th>Value</th>
          <th>Notes</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr><td>Platform Dimensions</td><td>600 × 450 × 400 mm</td><td>Length × Width × Height (approx.)</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Total Weight</td><td>20 kg</td><td>Including battery and all components</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Operating Speed</td><td>0.2 – 1.0 m/s</td><td>Adjustable via NAV2 parameters</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Drive System</td><td>Differential Drive</td><td>4-wheel, DC motors with encoders</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Battery</td><td>12V, 18 Ah</td><td>With Battery Management System (BMS)</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Estimated Runtime</td><td>~3 – 4 hours</td><td>Under normal operating conditions</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Main Controller</td><td>Raspberry Pi 4B</td><td>Running ROS 2</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Primary Sensor</td><td>LiDAR + IMU</td><td>360° laser scan + inertial odometry</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Localization</td><td>AMCL + SLAM</td><td>Real-time map matching via NAV2</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Navigation Stack</td><td>NAV2 (MPPI)</td><td>Path planning + obstacle avoidance</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Authentication</td><td>RFID</td><td>Card-based staff access control</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Display / HMI</td><td>LCD Touchscreen</td><td>Station selection and status</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Frame Material</td><td>MS Pipes + PVC</td><td>Mild Steel structural frame</td></tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="section-divider"></div>

<!-- HOW IT WORKS -->
<section id="how-it-works">
  <div class="fade-in">
    <div class="s-label">Workflow</div>
    <h2 class="s-heading">How It Works</h2>
    <p class="s-body">A step-by-step breakdown of the autonomous medicine delivery process — from environment mapping to final delivery.</p>
  </div>

  <!-- TWO MODES OVERVIEW -->
  <div class="fade-in" style="transition-delay:0.05s;display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:2rem;margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
    <div style="flex:1;min-width:220px;background:var(--teal-light);border:1px solid rgba(15,110,86,0.2);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.25rem 1.5rem;display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:center;">
      <div style="width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--teal);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;">
        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="3 6 9 3 15 6 21 3 21 18 15 21 9 18 3 21"/><line x1="9" y1="3" x2="9" y2="18"/><line x1="15" y1="6" x2="15" y2="21"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:14px;color:var(--dark);">Mode 1 — Mapping</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--gray-text);margin-top:2px;">Robot explores the environment using SLAM Toolbox to build a saved 2D map of the hospital floor.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="flex:1;min-width:220px;background:var(--blue-light);border:1px solid rgba(24,95,165,0.2);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.25rem 1.5rem;display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:center;">
      <div style="width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--blue);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;">
        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"/><polyline points="9 22 9 12 15 12 15 22"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:14px;color:var(--dark);">Mode 2 — Delivery</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--gray-text);margin-top:2px;">Robot uses the saved map to autonomously navigate, localize, and deliver medicine to the selected station.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- INFOGRAPHIC FLOW -->
  <div class="fade-in infograph-grid" style="transition-delay:0.1s;">

    <!-- Step 1 -->
    <div class="infograph-step">
      <div class="infograph-num" style="background:var(--teal);color:#fff;">1</div>
      <div class="infograph-icon" style="background:var(--teal-light);border-color:var(--teal-soft);">
        <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--teal)" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="5" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><line x1="2" y1="10" x2="22" y2="10"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="infograph-label">RFID Authentication</div>
      <div class="infograph-desc">Staff scans RFID card to authenticate. System verifies identity and unlocks the medicine compartment for loading.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="infograph-arrow">→</div>

    <!-- Step 2 -->
    <div class="infograph-step">
      <div class="infograph-num" style="background:#378ADD;color:#fff;">2</div>
      <div class="infograph-icon" style="background:var(--blue-light);border-color:#B5D4F4;">
        <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--blue)" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="3" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><line x1="8" y1="21" x2="16" y2="21"/><line x1="12" y1="17" x2="12" y2="21"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="infograph-label">Station Selection</div>
      <div class="infograph-desc">Operator selects the target ward on the HMI LCD touchscreen. The goal pose is passed to NAV2 navigation stack.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="infograph-arrow">→</div>

    <!-- Step 3 -->
    <div class="infograph-step">
      <div class="infograph-num" style="background:#9A5E00;color:#fff;">3</div>
      <div class="infograph-icon" style="background:#FFF4E0;border-color:#FAC775;">
        <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#9A5E00" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="3 6 9 3 15 6 21 3 21 18 15 21 9 18 3 21"/><line x1="9" y1="3" x2="9" y2="18"/><line x1="15" y1="6" x2="15" y2="21"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="infograph-label">SLAM Localization</div>
      <div class="infograph-desc">AMCL compares live LiDAR laser scans with the saved map to localize the robot in real time with high accuracy.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="infograph-arrow">→</div>

    <!-- Step 4 -->
    <div class="infograph-step">
      <div class="infograph-num" style="background:#6D28D9;color:#fff;">4</div>
      <div class="infograph-icon" style="background:#EDE9FE;border-color:#C4B5FD;">
        <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#6D28D9" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="22 12 18 12 15 21 9 3 6 12 2 12"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="infograph-label">Path Planning (MPPI)</div>
      <div class="infograph-desc">NAV2 with MPPI controller computes the optimal collision-free path. The robot begins autonomous movement toward the goal.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="infograph-arrow infograph-arrow-wrap">→</div>

    <!-- Step 5 -->
    <div class="infograph-step">
      <div class="infograph-num" style="background:#DC2626;color:#fff;">5</div>
      <div class="infograph-icon" style="background:#FEE2E2;border-color:#FCA5A5;">
        <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#DC2626" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="infograph-label">Obstacle Avoidance</div>
      <div class="infograph-desc">LiDAR continuously scans 360°. When an obstacle is detected, MPPI dynamically re-plans the path to avoid collision.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="infograph-arrow">→</div>

    <!-- Step 6 -->
    <div class="infograph-step">
      <div class="infograph-num" style="background:var(--teal-mid);color:#fff;">6</div>
      <div class="infograph-icon" style="background:var(--teal-light);border-color:var(--teal-soft);">
        <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--teal)" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M22 11.08V12a10 10 0 1 1-5.93-9.14"/><polyline points="22 4 12 14.01 9 11.01"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="infograph-label">Delivery Complete</div>
      <div class="infograph-desc">Robot arrives at destination and halts. LCD panel notifies staff. Medicine is collected, completing the delivery cycle.</div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- Software Stack Banner -->
  <div class="fade-in" style="transition-delay:0.2s;margin-top:2.5rem;background:var(--dark);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.5rem 2rem;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1.5rem;align-items:center;">
    <div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);font-size:12px;font-weight:500;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;white-space:nowrap;">Software Stack</div>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.6rem;">
      <span class="stack-pill">ROS 2</span>
      <span class="stack-pill">SLAM Toolbox</span>
      <span class="stack-pill">NAV2</span>
      <span class="stack-pill">AMCL</span>
      <span class="stack-pill">MPPI Controller</span>
      <span class="stack-pill">RViz</span>
      <span class="stack-pill">URDF</span>
      <span class="stack-pill">Raspberry Pi 4B</span>
      <span class="stack-pill">RFID</span>
      <span class="stack-pill">LiDAR + IMU</span>
    </div>
  </div>

</section>
<!-- DEMO VIDEO -->
<section id="demo-video" style="padding-top:4rem;padding-bottom:4rem;">
  <div class="fade-in" style="text-align:center;">
    <div class="s-label" style="display:flex;justify-content:center;">Project Demo</div>
    <h2 class="s-heading" style="text-align:center;">Watch It in Action</h2>
    <p class="s-body" style="margin:0 auto 2rem;text-align:center;">Full demonstration of the autonomous medicine delivery robot navigating, localizing, and completing a delivery.</p>

    <div style="max-width:760px;margin:0 auto;border-radius:var(--radius);overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow-md);background:var(--dark);">
      <iframe
        src="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1y8kAq4l1I4NBtLXnACnhq6TRbhZjIOXZ/preview"
        width="100%"
        height="480"
        allow="autoplay"
        allowfullscreen
        style="display:block;border:none;background:#000;"
      ></iframe>

      Autonomous Medicine Delivery Robot — P2222 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Air University 2026
    </p>

</section>

<div class="section-divider"></div>


<footer>
  <p><strong>Design and Development of a Mobility Platform for Medicine Delivery in Healthcare Facilities</strong></p>
  <p style="margin-top:0.4rem;">Sana Raouf &nbsp;·&nbsp; Arslan Rizwan &nbsp;·&nbsp; Aakasha Amjad &nbsp;·&nbsp; Supervisor: Dr. Umair Aziz</p>
  <p style="margin-top:0.4rem;">Air University, Islamabad &nbsp;·&nbsp; BE Mechatronics Engineering &nbsp;·&nbsp; Session 2022–2026</p>
</footer>

<script>
  const io = new IntersectionObserver(e => e.forEach(x => { if (x.isIntersecting) x.target.classList.add('visible'); }), { threshold: 0.15 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.fade-in').forEach(el => io.observe(el));

  const pillarObs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) {
        document.querySelectorAll('.pillar-card').forEach(c => c.classList.add('visible'));
        setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('mergeArrow').classList.add('visible'), 700);
        setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('robotShowcase').classList.add('visible'), 950);
        pillarObs.disconnect();
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.2 });
  const pr = document.getElementById('pillarsRow');

  if (pr) pillarObs.observe(pr);

  const flowObs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) {
        const d = parseFloat(e.target.getAttribute('data-delay') || 0);
        setTimeout(() => e.target.classList.add('visible'), d * 1000);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.2 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.flow-step').forEach(el => flowObs.observe(el));

  // Circular photo placeholders
  document.querySelectorAll('.avatar img, .sup-av img').forEach(img => {
    if (!img.src || img.src === window.location.href) img.style.display = 'none';
    else { img.style.display = 'block'; if (img.nextElementSibling) img.nextElementSibling.style.display = 'none'; }
  });

  // Generic image upload helper
  function setupImgUpload(fileId, imgId, hintId, frameSolid) {
    const input = document.getElementById(fileId);
    if (!input) return;
    input.addEventListener('change', function() {
      const file = this.files[0];
      if (!file) return;
      const reader = new FileReader();
      reader.onload = function(ev) {
        const img = document.getElementById(imgId);
        img.src = ev.target.result;
        img.style.display = 'block';
        const hint = document.getElementById(hintId);
        if (hint) hint.style.display = 'none';
        if (frameSolid) {
          const wrap = img.closest('.pillar-img-wrap, .step-img-box');
          if (wrap) { wrap.style.borderStyle = 'solid'; wrap.style.borderColor = 'var(--teal-mid)'; wrap.style.background = 'var(--white)'; }
        }
      };
      reader.readAsDataURL(file);
    });
  }

  // Pillar images
  setupImgUpload('pillarFile1','pillarImg1','pillarHint1',true);
  setupImgUpload('pillarFile2','pillarImg2','pillarHint2',true);
  setupImgUpload('pillarFile3','pillarImg3','pillarHint3',true);

  // Step images
  setupImgUpload('stepFile1','stepImg1','stepHint1',true);
  setupImgUpload('stepFile2','stepImg2','stepHint2',true);
  setupImgUpload('stepFile3','stepImg3','stepHint3',true);
  setupImgUpload('stepFile4','stepImg4','stepHint4',true);
  setupImgUpload('stepFile5','stepImg5','stepHint5',true);

  // AU Logo upload
  document.getElementById('auLogoFile').addEventListener('change', function() {
    const file = this.files[0];
    if (!file) return;
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = function(ev) {
      const img = document.getElementById('auLogoImg');
      img.src = ev.target.result;
      img.style.display = 'block';
      document.getElementById('auLogoHint').style.display = 'none';
      const wrap = document.getElementById('auLogoWrap');
      wrap.style.borderStyle = 'solid';
      wrap.style.borderColor = 'var(--teal-mid)';
      wrap.style.background = 'var(--white)';
    };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  });

  // Robot photo upload
  document.getElementById('robotFile').addEventListener('change', function() {
    const file = this.files[0];
    if (!file) return;
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = function(ev) {
      const img = document.getElementById('robotImg');
      img.src = ev.target.result;
      img.style.display = 'block';
      document.getElementById('uploadHint').style.display = 'none';
      const frame = document.getElementById('robotFrame');
      frame.style.borderStyle = 'solid';
      frame.style.borderColor = 'var(--teal-mid)';
      frame.style.background = 'var(--white)';
    };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  });

  // QR code upload
  document.getElementById('qrFile').addEventListener('change', function() {
    const file = this.files[0];
    if (!file) return;
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = function(ev) {
      const img = document.getElementById('qrImg');
      img.src = ev.target.result;
      img.style.display = 'block';
      document.getElementById('qrHint').style.display = 'none';
      const frame = document.getElementById('qrFrame');
      frame.style.borderStyle = 'solid';
      frame.style.borderColor = 'var(--teal-mid)';
      frame.style.background = 'var(--white)';
    };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  });
</script>
</body>
</html>
